editorial_soft.name: Editorial Soft
editorial_soft.description: Minimal monetization for informational articles that should remain mostly editorial.
editorial_soft.prompt_guidance: Keep product integration light and secondary to the editorial advice. Only mention products where they genuinely help the reader act on the idea.
inline_sentence_templates: If you want one practical piece to support this approach, [{title}]({affiliate_url}) is an easy option.
A subtle way to make this easier at home is with [{title}]({affiliate_url}).

utility_light.name: Utility Light
utility_light.description: Helpful, low-density monetization for implementation-heavy articles.
utility_light.prompt_guidance: Use only one or two utility-oriented products where they solve a real implementation step. Keep the article practical, not sales-led.
inline_sentence_templates: A practical helper here is [{title}]({affiliate_url}), especially if you want a simpler setup.
If you want an easier way to pull this off, [{title}]({affiliate_url}) can help without changing the overall look.

inspiration_blend.name: Inspiration Blend
inspiration_blend.description: Soft inspiration-plus-product mix for visually led articles.
inspiration_blend.prompt_guidance: Let the article stay inspiration-led. Product mentions should feel like optional ways to recreate the mood rather than the point of the piece.
inline_sentence_templates: For a piece that captures this mood, [{title}]({affiliate_url}) is an easy starting point.
If you want to bring this look home without overthinking it, [{title}]({affiliate_url}) fits naturally.

fix_oriented.name: Fix Oriented
fix_oriented.description: Corrective, problem-solving monetization for mistakes-and-fixes articles.
fix_oriented.shop_block_heading: Products That Can Help Fix the Problem
fix_oriented.prompt_guidance: Use fix-oriented product mentions sparingly and only where they directly help solve the problem discussed in the section.
inline_sentence_templates: A useful fix here is [{title}]({affiliate_url}) if you want a straightforward solution.
When this issue needs a practical correction, [{title}]({affiliate_url}) is worth considering.

commercial_strong.name: Commercial Strong
commercial_strong.description: Stronger but still editorial monetization for option-led and recommendation articles.
commercial_strong.prompt_guidance: This article can support stronger product integration, but keep the recommendations tied to clear selection criteria and real reader needs.
inline_sentence_templates: If you want a ready-made option in this category, [{title}]({affiliate_url}) is worth a look.
A strong pick here is [{title}]({affiliate_url}) if this is the direction that fits your room best.
